title: Adding instructions for completing a task
excerpt: What is the best way that you all have found to add instructions for completing a task? We are accustomed to having a big, always visible block for this in our current system that we use to add reminders, instructions, q…

posts.author: rrhodes63 (Robin Rhodes)
posts.cookedHtml: What is the best way that you all have found to add instructions for completing a task? We are accustomed to having a big, always visible block for this in our current system that we use to add reminders, instructions, quick links, etc. It looks like info boxes could potentially serve this purpose, but everything I can find says these are going away. Or are already gone??

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Robin!

Instead of info boxes, you could use your Updates Section or a Text Column! A lot of people find the Updates Section really helpful for adding instructions to each task. It’s what my team does!

Let me know what you think!
